summary: Comprehensive testing of QueueIt Cyberpunk 2077 rebrand completed. All UI elements verified with cyberpunk aesthetic: neon cyan/yellow/red colors, Unbounded font for headings, JetBrains Mono for code/labels, HUD corner marks, glitch text effects, angular clip-path buttons, glass-morphism panels, scanline overlays. All pages tested: admin login, admin dashboard (desktop+mobile), customer portal, download website.

minor.issue: Search returns 'Search failed' error - likely due to Spotify not being connected. This is expected behavior when Spotify is not authenticated.

colors.cyan: #00F0FF - verified in QR codes, icons, borders
colors.accent: #FF003C (red) - verified in PURGE button, status indicators

fonts.unbounded: Verified in headings (QUEUEIT, QUEUE, SETTINGS, etc.)
fonts.jetbrains_mono: Verified in labels, placeholders, status text

effects.glitch_text: Verified in customer portal hero and download website hero
effects.scanlines: Verified in admin login and dashboard
effects.clip_path_buttons: Verified in neon-button and cyan-button styles
effects.glass_morphism: Verified in mobile header and tab bar

context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete Cyberpunk 2077 rebrand verified. CSS variables: --primary=#FCEE0A, --cyan=#00F0FF, --accent=#FF003C, --bg=#050505. Fonts: Unbounded (headings), JetBrains Mono (mono/labels), IBM Plex Sans (body). Framer-motion used for AnimatePresence tab transitions. The onboarding may appear on first login - skip it with [data-testid='onboarding-skip']. Customer portal uses state-based tabs controlled by activeTab state. Mobile admin has bottom tab bar with 4 tabs (Player, Queue, QR, SYS). The Emergent preview badge may overlap bottom tabs - use force=True or JS clicks for testing. Search functionality requires Spotify to be connected.
